message:
🐛 Fix test failure in Coverage Suite (#10189)

Advance fake timers by 7000ms (up from 2000ms) in the
'analyze in demo mode' test so the poll interval (4000ms)
fires after the triggerAnalysis demo delay (2000ms) and
cleanup()/clearActiveTokenCategory is actually invoked.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
